name: Quicksilver Reaction Mod
effect: 1/Round, the weapon this mod is attached to can perform an Overwatch as a Reaction by expending a charge when it normally wouldn't be able to. Doing so gain 2 Heat immediately and become Slowed until the end of your next turn.
description: When you just want to inflict violence to another at the soonest opportunity you get. A rather curious weapon mod made by an intern at EINS, was initially made as a gag module to annoy several test pilots, interestingly enough it actually has found a rather devote group of enthusiast. . . .

added_tags.name: LIMITED {VAL}
added_tags.description: This weapon or system can only be used {VAL} times before it requires a Full Repair. Some Limited systems, like Grenades, describe these uses as “charges”. To use the system, the user expends a charge.

added_tags.name: UNIQUE
added_tags.description: This weapon or system cannot be duplicated – each character can only have one copy of it installed at a time.

added_tags.name: {VAL}/Round
added_tags.description: This system, trait or reaction can be used {VAL} number of times between the start of the user’s turn and the start of their next turn.

added_tags.name: Heat {VAL} (Self)
added_tags.description: Immediately after using this weapon or system, the user takes {VAL} Heat.

name: Expanded Ammo Pack
effect: 1/Round, when a weapon this mod is applied to becomes unloaded, expend a charge as a free action, the weapon instead remains loaded and does not become unloaded and you gain 2 Heat immediately. (This is not considered reloading).
description: An expanded ammo pack, attachable to many forms of armaments increasing viable ammunition capacity before needing to reload.

name: Modular Grenade Launcher Mod
effect: 1/Round, on a hit with the weapon this mod is applied to, expend a charge, as a reaction, to launch one of your Grenade centered on the same target. (This consumes a charge of your Grenade)
description: A modular grenade launcher weapon mod, easily attachable to many forms of armaments allows for the follow-up usage of on hand launch and forget grenades.

name: Arc Shot Mod
effect:
This mod can only be applied to weapons with a Range attack pattern.

The weapon this mod is applied to gains the Arcing equipment tag and Heat 1 (Self).
description:
Alternative firing solutions and angle calibration library software allows for standard pattern weapons to be effectively used with non-direct firing modes.

"Watch me curve this bullet to hit that guy hiding behind that cover!"
"I call BS, no such thing as being able to curve a bullet!"
". . . and that my friend is why everyone calls you Boring McDaniels your a killjoy, just sit there and watch me"
- Excerpt from on file record combat data logs from Pvt. Jacobs "Daredevil" Windham to Pvt. Hammond "Boring" McDaniels during the siege of New Cascaan.

added_tags.name: Arcing
added_tags.description: This weapon can be fired over obstacles, usually by lobbing a projectile in an arc. Attacks made with this weapon don’t require line of sight, as long as it’s possible to trace a path to the target; however, they are still affected by cover.

added_tags.name: Heat {VAL} (Self)
added_tags.description: Immediately after using this weapon or system, the user takes {VAL} Heat.

name: Arsenal Drone Mod
effect: The weapon this mod is attached to gains the Arsenal Drone which can be deployed as a quick action.
description: Modification package for the daring, inventive or sometimes downright eccentric drone commanders. The Arsenal Drone, provides an alternative avenue for fielding standard mech grade weaponry in the battlefield.

deployables.name: Arsenal Drone
deployables.detail:
While the Arsenal Drone is deployed, the weapon this mod is installed on cannot be used to Skirmish or Barrage with normally. Instead, the Arsenal Drone automatically fires the weapon on its own at the nearest hostile character within Range or Threat and Line of Sight at start of your turn. Weapons fired by the Arsenal Drone this way, do not benefit from or trigger your talents, deals half damage including Heat and Burn on a hit, and gain the following equipment effects:
  • Auxiliary : gains 1 Reliable damage and damage from this weapon cannot be reduced below its Reliable value by any means.
  • Main: after firing this weapon the Arsenal Drone moves 1 space in a direction of its choice, this movement ignores reactions and engagement.
  • Heavy: after firing this weapon the Arsenal Drone is knocked backed 3 spaces directly away from the target.
If the Arsenal Drone is destroyed, the weapon this mod is installed on immediately drops to the ground and must be retrieved by being adjacent to it and using a quick action to install the weapon on your mech again.
